title: How Box Created 13 New Types of Jobs Because of A.I.
summary: Box, a Silicon Valley software maker, expects to have more employees, not fewer, as it hires A.I. architects, A.I. solutions managers and other new A.I.-related positions.

title: Is A.I. Replacing Tech Workers or Providing an Excuse for Job Cuts?
summary: Tech industry layoffs are accelerating, and executives have been quick to say it’s because their companies are doing more with artificial intelligence, even when there may be more to it.

title: China Aims A.I. at Predicting Who Could Pose a Political Risk
summary: New research examines how a Chinese company struggled to develop its predictive surveillance technology while U.S. restrictions were in place.

title: Nvidia Has a Plan to Put Its Chips in Personal Computers
summary: The world’s most valuable company is chasing Intel and Apple as it tries to bring A.I. agents to laptops and desktops.

title: Joby Demonstrated its Air Taxi in Manhattan, but You Can’t Fly in It Yet
summary: Aviation start-ups and the Trump administration want to replace helicopters with electric aircraft, but the new vehicles still have to pass arduous tests before the public can use them.

title: Powerful A.I. Super PACs Duel Over the Midterms: ‘This Is a War’
summary: One super PAC is allied with Anthropic. The other is tied to OpenAI. They’re both spending millions to influence this year’s elections.

title: What’s Next for Blue Origin After Rocket Explosion
summary: Jeff Bezos was gaining ground on Elon Musk’s SpaceX and Starlink. Thursday’s rocket explosion on a launchpad creates a major setback.

title: Interesting Times: Why Are We Still Driving?
summary: Confronting the weirdness of a Waymo future.

title: Anthropic Tops OpenAI to Become the World’s Most Valuable A.I. Start-Up
summary: Anthropic raised $65 billion in new fund-raising that put its value at $900 billion, ahead of OpenAI’s last valuation of $730 billion, as the companies duel for A.I. dominance.

title: A.I. Is Making Scams Hard to Spot. Here’s How to Protect Yourself.
summary: A criminal could be masquerading as a celebrity, web store or family member asking for your money. Detecting scams requires a new approach.

title: I Tried to Sell My House With A.I.
summary: Over five frantic days, I gambled my family’s life savings on a hunch that A.I. could outperform a real estate agent.

title: Teachers Union Urges Schools to Curb A.I. Chatbots and Screen Time
summary: The American Federation of Teachers recommended “no screens” at all for those in second grade or younger, and no A.I. chatbots for students in elementary school.

title: Spencer Pratt Wants to Be Mayor. His Fans Want Him to Be Batman.
summary: What an A.I.-generated video of the former reality TV star teaches us about the future of political ads.

title: Go Ask Alice Why Tech Start-Ups Are Spending Big on Hype Videos
summary: A Mad Hatter and a giant rabbit sit around a table discussing an A.I. start-up. This is normal behavior around the Bay Area these days.

title: At the A.I. Epicenter, Technologists Dismiss Pope Leo’s Warnings About the New Technology
summary: Pope Leo XIV’s spiritual message on artificial intelligence arrived as Silicon Valley’s A.I. enthusiasts pursue their own spirituality through technology.

title: SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals Favorable Terms for Elon Musk
summary: The ways it set up its board and Mr. Musk’s pay appear to benefit him at the expense of other shareholders, corporate governance experts said.

title: ‘The Maids,’ With Yerin Ha, Asks: Has Life Become One Big Performance?
summary: In his rethinking of Jean Genet’s classic work about class and power, Kip Williams ponders “a world that gives you every opportunity not to be yourself.”

title: Massachusetts Uber and Lyft Drivers Form First Union for Ride-Share Workers
summary: The App Drivers Union said it was the first organization in the country to be formally certified to represent drivers for apps such as Uber and Lyft.

title: As A.I. Fever Rises in Silicon Valley, Pope Leo Has a Few Words
summary: The American pope wants to take artificial intelligence down a notch. Is he challenging the tech companies, or will tech take over the papacy?

title: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
summary: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.
